description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bazel that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two ubuntu-latest jobs: build_direct and build_indirect. Both jobs check out the repository with submodules, mount a bazel cache, install bazelisk, and install Flex, Bison, and GMP. The build_direct job builds p4c directly with bazel, while the build_indirect job builds a 3rd party Bazel project depending on p4c as a subproject.
